name: Poulet Fleuri (Flowering Chicken)
recipeIngredient: 4 boned and skinned chicken breast halves
salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook carrots and celery separately in salted water until crisp/tender.
2. Blanch snow peas for 1 minute in boiling water, then plunge immediately into cold water to stop cooking.
3. Julienne the snow peas. Clean scallions; cut off and save the green tops (save the whites for another recipe). Cut all vegetables to a uniform length of about 3 inches.
4. Pound each chicken breast lightly with a flat-bottomed, stout glass until the breast is uniform thickness, about 1/2 inch. Lay one or two pieces of each vegetable in the middle of each flattened breast. Fold the opposite point over the long edge of the breast, then fold in the two ends. Finish by rolling from the long edge over the vegetables to create a nice, uniform-thickness roll with the vegetables completely enclosed.
5. Bring chicken stock to a boil. Place each rolled breast on a sheet of plastic wrap three times its length. Roll up the meat tightly in the wrap; twist the ends and fold them under the roll. Each roll should look like a giant piece of tightly wrapped taffy.
6. Poach the rolls in the simmering stock. If the liquid covers the rolls, poach for about 6 minutes. Otherwise, poach for 4 minutes, turn, and poach another 4 minutes. While the rolls are poaching, soak dried mushrooms in very hot water until soft.
7. Hold still-wrapped rolls in a warm oven while making the sauce.
8. Drain mushroom soaking liquid through a paper towel or coffee filter to remove grit, then add it to the chicken stock. Boil the mixture uncovered over high heat until reduced by half. Add cream and reduce again by half. Be careful as the cream may foam up. Slice mushrooms if large, removing tough stems, and add to sauce.
9. Taste sauce and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper.
10. To serve: Unwrap chicken breasts. Slice each roll on the diagonal into about 5 equal pieces. Arrange in a star pattern on plates, one breast per plate with sides up. Carefully spoon hot sauce around, not over, the chicken breasts. Include 3-4 mushroom pieces on each plate and dust lightly with paprika before serving.
